## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to Doppel and explore potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive content marketing services, including SEO/GEO strategy, AI-powered content creation, and CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Doppel is interested but concerned about cost ($15K/month) given their Series B stage](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [A follow-up call with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) is scheduled to address lingering questions and determine fit](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Service Overview

  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint, followed by 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise for scalable, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Handles everything from strategy to CMS publishing and LLM analytics](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Can produce daily high-quality articles, outpacing traditional agencies](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Doppel's Current Content Approach

  - [Recently tripled marketing team, transitioning from agency partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Joel (content lead) currently using ChatGPT and considering freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Balancing SEO-focused content with thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Recently launched "Doppelpedia" for 101 SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### GrowthX Differentiators

  - [Proprietary AI platform with customizable workflows](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Expertise from Marcel's experience at Deepgram](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Comprehensive service beyond typical SEO agencies](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Success stories with clients like Augment (2x traffic, 300 new signups/week)](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

### Cost and ROI Discussion

  - [GrowthX's $15K/month pricing is higher than previous agency partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Joel acknowledges potential value in comprehensive service and daily content](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Rodolfo expresses concern about cost given Doppel's Series B stage](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [GrowthX plans SOC2 compliance in H1 next year](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Doppel transitioning to Drupal CMS in the next month](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [GrowthX can work with sensitive data constraints](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up call with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) on Thursday, Oct 2nd at 10:30 AM PT / 1:30 PM ET](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [GrowthX to send meeting recording and additional resources](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Doppel to internally discuss budget and readiness for partnership](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Address remaining questions and determine fit in next call with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/dzsy6z5_Ce8WDPWob6DcJZrs3K9DTJvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
